specific_location: 1/4 mile west of the intersection of Hwy 17 and North River Road, near Cattail Golf Course
description: White bird around 25" with long thin, decurved, red bill with what appeared to be black tip (bill was very muddy at the tip) Red facial skin, red legs. Rest of the bird white except for tips of outer primaries, which were black. Yellowish irisBehavior: Bird was actively foraging and associating with White-faced Ibis in flooded field. At one point a large part of the flock flew giving us excellent views of the bird in flight.Call: None that could be distinguishedPlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Polly Neldner, Polly Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
